ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "engine_hp" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle's engine */,
  "engine_cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission in the vehicle */,
  "driven_wheels" TEXT /* Type of wheels driven by the vehicle */,
  "highway_mpg" INTEGER /* Highway miles per gallon */,
  "city_mpg" INTEGER /* City miles per gallon */,
  "msrp" INTEGER /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "vehicle_variant" TEXT /* Variant of the vehicle model */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type of the vehicle */,
  "engine_displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "engine_torque" INTEGER /* Engine torque in Nm */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in liters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in kilograms */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the vehicle */,
  "cargo_capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity of the vehicle in liters */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "emissions_standard" TEXT /* Emissions standard the vehicle meets */,
  "fuel_efficiency_combined" REAL /* Combined fuel efficiency in mpg */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_type FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_type") REFERENCES transmission_types ("transmission_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_driven_wheels FOREIGN KEY ("driven_wheels") REFERENCES driven_wheels ("driven_wheels_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the vehicle make */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Official website of the vehicle make */,
  "company_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the make record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the make record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "model_series" TEXT /* Series of the model */,
  "model_launch_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was first launched */,
  "model_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was discontinued */,
  "model_designer" TEXT /* Designer of the model */,
  "model_features" TEXT /* Key features of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "transmission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transmission type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transmission type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transmission type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driven_wheels" (
  "driven_wheels_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driven wheels type */,
  "driven_wheels_name" TEXT /* Name of the driven wheels type */,
  "driven_wheels_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the driven wheels type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the driven wheels type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the driven wheels type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driven_wheels_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specifications" (
  "engine_spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "engine_hp" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "engine_cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "engine_displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "engine_torque" INTEGER /* Engine torque in Nm */,
  "engine_fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the engine uses */,
  "engine_fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in liters */,
  "engine_emissions_standard" TEXT /* Emissions standard the engine meets */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the engine specification record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the engine specification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_specifications_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, enthusiast) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle the feedback is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., error, suggestion, enhancement) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_changes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
